response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in software development, architecture, and team leadership across diverse industries and technologies. His background includes leading interdisciplinary teams, designing scalable systems, and mentoring developers, aligning well with the Head of Development/Tech Lead role. However, his limited direct experience with UML, formal IT architecture frameworks, and German language proficiency (Basic) are notable gaps. His open-source contributions and strategic thinking are strong positives.
strengths: 15+ years of progressive leadership in software development and architecture, including founding and scaling an open-source platform (GISCollective)
Extensive experience with modern stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) and high-performance systems (e.g., handling millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to mentor teams, organize workshops, and drive technical excellence (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, refactoring dojos at National Instruments)
concerns: Limited direct experience with UML modeling and formal IT architecture frameworks, which are key requirements for the role
German language proficiency is only at a basic level (A1/A2), falling short of the required C1 level for client-facing communication
No explicit mention of IT security, risk management, or compliance experience, which are critical for advisory roles
